sources: MERDIAN_Master_V18_v2 Section 15 (File Master, Table Master, Security IDs, AWS Runtime Files)
MERDIAN_Appendix_V18A_v4 Block 3 (file updates), Block 4 (table updates), Block 5 (schema changes)
_meta.purpose: Machine-queryable operational lookup layer. Use for fast session resume context injection. Authoritative on current operational state. For architectural intent and decisions see master docx files.
_meta.authority_note: When this JSON conflicts with a master docx: JSON wins on current operational state. Docx wins on architecture, governance, and decisions.
_meta.update_cadence: Update this file in the same session as any meaningful change to file status, table schema, or open item status. Commit to Git immediately after update.

capture_market_spot_snapshot_local.py.cadence: Step 1 of tape runner. Also AWS 09:08 IST cron (pre-open capture).

capture_index_futures_snapshot_local.py.status: ACTIVE â€” dynamic contract resolution (V17E). Static security_ids REMOVED.

ingest_option_chain_local.py.cadence: Step 3 of tape runner (ATM_ONLY ~10 rows). Step 3 of options runner (FULL ~534/606 rows).
ingest_option_chain_local.py.stdout_contract: Emits 'Run ID: <uuid>' on success. Runner parses this line to extract run_id for gamma and volatility steps. TREAT AS API CONTRACT â€” do not change prefix.
ingest_option_chain_local.py.status: ACTIVE â€” currently failing 401 on Local (V18A). AWS status depends on token refresh.

run_option_snapshot_intraday_runner.py.status: ACTIVE â€” no circuit-breaker on auth failure (V18A-02 open)

reads: orchestrator â€” parses ingest stdout for run_id

ingest_breadth_intraday_local.py.cadence: Step 1 of options runner (4-layer guard system)
guards: Guard 4: staleness check â€” MAX(ts) > 20min -> STOP
ingest_breadth_intraday_local.py.status: ACTIVE â€” skips when trading_calendar row missing (V18A-03)

build_wcb_snapshot_local.py.status: ACTIVE â€” continues writing rows even when Dhan option auth is broken (V18A confirmed)

archive_option_chain_history.py.cadence: Step 3a of options runner (idempotent â€” skips if run_id already archived)

compute_gamma_metrics_local.py.call_signature: <run_id>   NOTE: run_id is UUID, NOT symbol
compute_gamma_metrics_local.py.status: ACTIVE â€” updated V18A: gamma_zone and raw columns added. UPSERT on (symbol,ts).
compute_gamma_metrics_local.py.v18a_changes: Added gamma_zone (E-02 three-zone shadow). Added raw jsonb metadata. Changed INSERT to UPSERT with unique index on (symbol,ts).

compute_volatility_metrics_local.py.call_signature: <run_id>   NOTE: run_id is UUID, NOT symbol
compute_volatility_metrics_local.py.status: ACTIVE â€” IV=0 filter active. ATM fallback: if CE IV=0 uses PE IV. UNIQUE(symbol,ts) enforced.

build_market_state_snapshot_local.py.status: ACTIVE â€” V18A: flip_distance_pct canonical, flip_distance_points added as diagnostic. C-01 UPSERT fix still pending.
build_market_state_snapshot_local.py.v18a_changes: flip_distance_pct is now canonical gamma distance field. flip_distance_points added as raw diagnostic. flip_distance retained for backward compat.

build_trade_signal_local.py.status: ACTIVE â€” confirmed already using flip_distance_pct correctly (V18A audit). Not modified in V18A.

build_signal_regret_log_v1.py.cadence: Manual / scheduled batch. NOT per-minute live step.
build_signal_regret_log_v1.py.status: ACTIVE â€” built and validated V18A. 614 rows confirmed.

refresh_dhan_token.py.cadence: Windows Task: MERDIAN_Dhan_Token_Refresh at 09:05 IST (Local). AWS cron: 09:05 IST.
refresh_dhan_token.py.status: ACTIVE â€” created V18A. Manual run validated both environments. Windows unattended not yet proven (V18A-01).

compute_options_flow_local.py.cadence: MANUAL ONLY. Shadow Step 3a. Not yet wired into runner.

build_shadow_signal_v3_local.py.critical_note: shadow_signal_snapshots_v2 was NEVER created. ALL queries must target v3.

compute_iv_context_local.py.cadence: MERDIAN_IV_Context_0905 Windows Task at 09:05 IST (morning only)

ingest_equity_eod_local.py.cadence: Scheduled / manual backfill. Cursor-gate logic active (V17D1 fix).
ingest_equity_eod_local.py.status: ACTIVE â€” cursor advance gated on full coverage confirmation

run_equity_eod_until_done.py.cadence: Recovery / backfill use only. ~4hr runtime. AWS cron: 16:10 IST.

gamma_engine_telemetry_logger.py.status: ACTIVE â€” supervisor write failure (M-07 open)

build_option_execution_outcomes_v1.py.status: NEEDS MIGRATION â€” must be updated to read from option_chain_snapshots ATM_ONLY rows

evaluate_shadow_vs_live.py.status: FUNCTIONAL â€” returns 0 rows until sufficient forward horizon data in intraday_ohlc. Not a defect.

run_market_close_capture_once.bat.cadence: Manual at 15:30 IST or via MERDIAN_Market_Close_Capture Windows Task

run_market_close_capture_once.py.status: ACTIVE (AWS only) â€” created V18A for AWS parity

ingest_option_execution_price_history_v2.status: RETIRED â€” renamed .DEAD in V17E. DO NOT USE.

run_market_tape_1m.pre_premarket_fix.DEA.status: RETIRED â€” renamed .DEAD in V17E. DO NOT USE.

market_spot_snapshots.critical_rule: NO trade_date column. Use ts AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Kolkata' for session date. Never WHERE trade_date = current_date.

market_spot_session_markers.critical_rule: capture_quality field values: FULL | PARTIAL_OPEN_ONLY | PREMARKET_ONLY | POSTMARKET_ONLY | MISSING

index_futures_snapshots.status: LIVE â€” dynamic contract (V17E). contract_symbol shows actual front-month.
index_futures_snapshots.critical_rule: expiry_date is dynamically resolved, not hardcoded. Old static security_ids REMOVED.

option_chain_snapshots.constraint: None at table level (run_id is per-call UUID)
option_chain_snapshots.status: LIVE â€” dual cadence. Currently failing 401 on Local (V18A).
option_chain_snapshots.critical_rule: FULL rows: ~534 NIFTY / ~606 SENSEX per cycle. ATM_ONLY: ~10 per cycle. Distinguish by row count per run_id or ts cadence. Schema uses ts NOT trade_date.

gamma_metrics.constraint: UNIQUE INDEX uix_gamma_metrics_symbol_ts ON (symbol, ts) â€” ADDED V18A
gamma_metrics.critical_rule: Call signature: run_id (UUID) NOT symbol. regime: LONG_GAMMA | SHORT_GAMMA | NO_FLIP. gamma_zone: HIGH_GAMMA | MID_GAMMA | LOW_GAMMA | None (new V18A).
gamma_metrics.v18a_changes: ADD COLUMN gamma_zone text. ADD COLUMN raw jsonb. CREATE UNIQUE INDEX uix_gamma_metrics_symbol_ts ON (symbol, ts).

volatility_snapshots.critical_rule: Call signature: run_id (UUID) NOT symbol. IV=0 filter active. ATM fallback: if CE IV=0 uses PE IV.

weighted_constituent_breadth_snapshots.status: LIVE â€” continues writing even when Dhan option auth broken (V18A confirmed)
weighted_constituent_breadth_snapshots.critical_rule: Uses index_symbol NOT symbol. Coverage field: active_weight_pct NOT weight_coverage_pct.

momentum_snapshots.critical_rule: 8 fields: ret_5m, ret_15m, ret_30m, ret_60m, ret_session, atm_straddle_change, price_vs_vwap_pct, vwap_slope.

market_state_snapshots.constraint: MISSING â€” C-01 CRITICAL. No UNIQUE(symbol,ts). Duplicate rows confirmed.
market_state_snapshots.status: LIVE WITH DEFECT â€” C-01 open. Duplicate rows exist.
market_state_snapshots.critical_rule: Features are JSONB not flat columns. Use ->> extraction. flip_distance_pct is canonical (V18A). C-01: INSERT must become UPSERT. UNIQUE(symbol,ts) must be added.
market_state_snapshots.v18a_changes: flip_distance_pct now canonical. flip_distance_points added as raw diagnostic. flip_distance retained for backward compat.

signal_snapshots.critical_rule: conviction_score_debug + execution_penalty_debug = confidence_score. trade_allowed field gates execution.

signal_regret_log.status: ACTIVE â€” 614 rows. Built and validated V18A.
signal_regret_log.critical_rule: signal_snapshot_id is bigint (NOT uuid). FK mismatch was resolved in V18A. Schema confirmed V18A Block 5.
signal_regret_log.governance: Must reach 30+ sessions of DO_NOTHING outcome data before any confidence threshold changes. Clock started V18A.

equity_eod.critical_rule: Cursor state in breadth_ingest_state. Cursor advance gated on full coverage (V17D1 fix).

equity_intraday_last.critical_rule: Universe: ~1,382-1,385 tickers. Guard 4: if MAX(ts) > 20 min old -> STOP.

market_breadth_intraday.status: LIVE â€” FIXED. RPC rebased to breadth_universe_members LEFT JOIN.
market_breadth_intraday.critical_rule: universe_count must be ~1,385. If 550: RPC using stale LTP or guards fired.

written_by: build_market_breadth_intraday RPC â€” view or derived
latest_market_breadth_intraday.status: ACTIVE â€” may be a view over market_breadth_intraday. Verify in Supabase before querying directly.

breadth_universe_members.status: ACTIVE â€” source of truth for universe. is_active=true filter.

breadth_indicators_daily.status: ACTIVE â€” indicator layer for DMA10/DMA20/DMA40. RPC uses LEFT JOIN so missing indicators do not shrink universe.

breadth_ingest_state.status: ACTIVE â€” tracks EOD cursor per trade_date
breadth_ingest_state.critical_rule: Cursor advance gated on full coverage confirmation (V17D1 fix). Query: SELECT * FROM breadth_ingest_state ORDER BY updated_at DESC LIMIT 5 to inspect cursor state.

trading_calendar.status: AUTHORITATIVE â€” hard gate. Missing row = system treats day as closed/holiday.
trading_calendar.critical_rule: Maintain entries at least 1 week ahead at all times. Missing row is NOT a soft warning â€” it causes authoritative skip for ALL calendar-gated scripts. V18A-03 open.

momentum_snapshots_v2.status: ACTIVE â€” manual only. Shadow version.

smdm_snapshots.status: ACTIVE â€” manual only. pattern field: SQUEEZE | STOP_HUNT | etc.

shadow_signal_snapshots_v3.critical_rule: shadow_signal_snapshots_v2 was NEVER created. All queries must target v3. Columns include: live_action, live_confidence for parallel comparison.

iv_context_snapshots.status: ACTIVE â€” morning task via MERDIAN_IV_Context_0905

option_execution_price_history.status: DEPRECATED â€” no new rows. Formal DROP pending after outcome engine migration.

NIFTY_futures.security_id: DYNAMIC â€” resolved at session start
NIFTY_futures.query: SELECT security_id FROM dhan_scripmaster WHERE instrument_type='FUTIDX' AND ticker='NIFTY' AND expiry_date>=CURRENT_DATE ORDER BY expiry_date ASC LIMIT 1
NIFTY_futures.notes: Old static value 51714 REMOVED V17E. Dynamic resolution active.

SENSEX_futures.security_id: DYNAMIC â€” resolved at session start
SENSEX_futures.query: SELECT security_id FROM dhan_scripmaster WHERE instrument_type='FUTIDX' AND ticker='SENSEX' AND expiry_date>=CURRENT_DATE ORDER BY expiry_date ASC LIMIT 1
SENSEX_futures.notes: Old static value 825565 REMOVED V17E. Dynamic resolution active.

run_merdian_shadow_runner.py.purpose: Primary AWS shadow orchestrator. Self-loops 5-min. Parks in WAITING_FOR_SESSION after 15:30.

aws_shadow_runner.nohup.log.purpose: Execution trace for background nohup runs (cron-launched).

premarket.log.purpose: Trace of 09:08 pre-open capture. Confirmed: 2 rows inserted (NIFTY 23339.3, SENSEX 75390.72).

aws_shadow_runner.lock.purpose: Concurrency guard. Stale lock expected if prior run was killed â€” remove and restart.

aws_crontab_snapshot.txt.purpose: Saved snapshot of installed crontab after last install.

.env.purpose: Environment variables: SUPABASE_URL, SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY, DHAN_CLIENT_ID, DHAN_API_TOKEN, DHAN_TOTP_SEED.

aws_cron.install_rule: NEVER use interactive crontab -e. ALWAYS use non-interactive temp-file install.

entries.label: MERDIAN_Shadow_Runner
entries.cron: 15 9 * * 1-5  cd /home/ssm-user/meridian-engine && /bin/bash -lc 'set -a; . ./.env; set +a; nohup python3 run_merdian_shadow_runner.py >> logs/aws_shadow_runner.nohup.log 2>&1 &'

entries.label: MERDIAN_Postmarket
entries.notes: NOT YET PROVEN on AWS (A-02 open)

entries.label: MERDIAN_EOD
entries.notes: Cursor-gate logic not yet ported from V17D1 (A-04 open)

C-01.title: market_state_snapshots INSERT must become UPSERT
C-01.status: CLOSED (2026-03-31) — UNIQUE constraint added via ALTER TABLE
C-01.fix: ALTER TABLE public.market_state_snapshots ADD CONSTRAINT uq_market_state_symbol_ts UNIQUE (symbol, ts); Then change INSERT in build_market_state_snapshot_local.py to ON CONFLICT (symbol, ts) DO UPDATE SET ...

C-02.title: Re-ingest 2026-03-24 EOD data (39.71% coverage)
C-02.status: CLOSED (2026-03-31) — coverage 99.35% confirmed. Remaining 9 tickers are systematic DH-905 failures, not a re-ingest gap.
C-02.fix: Run ingest_equity_eod_local.py targeting 2026-03-24. Confirm coverage reaches ~99%.

C-03.title: SENSEX WCB staleness confirmation
C-03.status: OPEN â€” validate on next live session
C-03.fix: SELECT index_symbol, MAX(ts) as latest_ts, NOW() - MAX(ts) as lag FROM weighted_constituent_breadth_snapshots GROUP BY index_symbol; Lag must be < 10 min during live session.

C-05.title: build_trade_signal_local.py timeout
C-05.fix: Add DB query logging to identify which query is timing out.

C-08.title: Intermittent SENSEX volatility RuntimeError (ts missing)
C-08.fix: Investigate compute_volatility_metrics_local.py SENSEX ts missing error. Add defensive ts check.

V18A-01.title: Windows token refresh task unattended execution not yet proven
V18A-01.fix: Use full Python path in MERDIAN_Dhan_Token_Refresh task: C:\Users\balan\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python312\python.exe. Confirm .env timestamp updates after next scheduled 09:05 run without manual intervention.

V18A-02.title: Runner circuit-breaker on auth failure
V18A-02.status: CLOSED (2026-03-31) — circuit-breaker added to run_option_snapshot_intraday_runner.py. Detects 401 in ingest stdout, halts downstream pipeline, fires Telegram alert.
V18A-02.fix: In run_option_snapshot_intraday_runner.py: after ingest_option_chain_local.py returns 401, halt gamma/state/signal steps and fire OPTION_AUTH_BREAK Telegram alert. Do not continue cycling silently.

V18A-03.title: trading_calendar row maintenance discipline
V18A-03.status: CLOSED (2026-03-31) — calendar rows inserted for 2026-03-31 and next 7 trading days. Preflight Stage 2 now checks today row exists. CalendarSkip fix prevents crash loop on holidays.
V18A-03.fix: Weekly: check trading_calendar has rows for next 7 trading days. Add calendar row check to preflight Stage 2. Add Telegram alert if today's row missing at 08:30 IST.
blocks: All calendar-gated scripts (breadth, tape runner, runners)

A-01.title: Port 4 intraday guards to AWS runner
A-01.fix: run_merdian_shadow_runner.py needs same 4-layer guard system as local: calendar, session-state, coverage, staleness.

A-02.title: AWS 4:00 PM weighted-average close cron path
A-02.fix: Implement capture_postmarket_1600.py logic and validate before enabling cron.

A-03.title: Dhan TOTP automation â€” PARTIALLY CLOSED
A-03.status: PARTIALLY CLOSED (V18A) â€” manual proven both environments. Unattended Windows task pending (see V18A-01).

A-04.title: AWS EOD ingestion cursor-gate logic
A-04.fix: Port V17D1 cursor-gate logic to AWS ingest_equity_eod_local.py. Validate end-to-end.

D-06.title: flip_distance unit inconsistency â€” SUBSTANTIALLY CLOSED
D-06.status: SUBSTANTIALLY CLOSED (V18A) â€” market-state canonicalization done. E-02 unblocked.
D-06.fix: Done. flip_distance_pct is canonical. Remaining: confirm no other consumer reads raw points field.

E-01.title: Signal regret log â€” CLOSED
E-01.governance: Must reach 30+ sessions of DO_NOTHING outcome data before any threshold changes. Clock started V18A.

E-02.title: Three-zone gamma model â€” SHADOW LIVE
E-02.status: SHADOW LIVE (V18A) â€” gamma_zone active in compute_gamma_metrics_local.py
E-02.fix: Observe shadow for 2 weeks minimum. Then assess live promotion via Phase 4 gate.

E-06.title: Outcome engine migration from deprecated table
E-06.fix: Update build_option_execution_outcomes_v1.py to read execution price from option_chain_snapshots ATM_ONLY rows nearest to signal timestamp.

governance_rules.run_id_vs_symbol_contract: compute_gamma_metrics_local.py and compute_volatility_metrics_local.py take run_id (UUID), NOT symbol. build_momentum_features_local.py, build_market_state_snapshot_local.py, build_trade_signal_local.py take symbol (NIFTY/SENSEX). Never swap these.
governance_rules.stdout_run_id_api_contract: ingest_option_chain_local.py emits 'Run ID: <uuid>' to stdout on success. Both local and AWS runners parse this exact string. Format is an API contract â€” do not change the prefix without updating runner parse logic.
governance_rules.runner_alive_ne_system_valid: Runner appearing alive does NOT mean system is valid. DB-dependent steps (WCB) can succeed while API-dependent steps (option ingest) fail 401. Confirmed V18A. Health checks must verify table recency, not just process existence.
governance_rules.trading_calendar_is_hard_gate: Missing trading_calendar row = authoritative skip for ALL calendar-gated scripts. Not a soft warning. Maintain 1 week ahead at all times.
governance_rules.premarket_anchor: 09:08 IST snapshot only. 09:00-09:07 premarket stream discarded by design.
governance_rules.close_anchor: 4:00 PM weighted close is the session close anchor. NOT 3:30 PM last tick.
governance_rules.threshold_governance: No confidence threshold changes until signal_regret_log has 30+ sessions of DO_NOTHING outcome data. ABSOLUTE GATE. Clock started V18A (614 rows).
governance_rules.measure_validate_shadow_promote: No change to any live signal file until (1) measurement gaps closed, (2) evidence collected, (3) shadow runs 2+ weeks at or above live accuracy, (4) model change log entry written.
governance_rules.full_file_replacement_only: Promote full file replacements only. No hand-patched partial snippets in deployment flow.
governance_rules.aws_env_load: set -a; . ./.env; set +a â€” canonical pattern for loading .env on AWS. Verify with echo $SUPABASE_URL after loading.
governance_rules.aws_cron_install: NEVER use interactive crontab -e. ALWAYS use temp-file non-interactive install. Save snapshot after every change: crontab -l > logs/aws_crontab_snapshot.txt
governance_rules.no_direct_aws_edits: Edit in Local only. AWS is deploy target. Emergency AWS edits (BREAK_GLASS only) must be copied to Local and committed to Git same session.
governance_rules.db_over_logs: DB is truth. Logs are secondary evidence. Health checks and validation must query tables (MAX(created_at), COUNT(*)) not parse log lines.
governance_rules.vwap_field_name: Coverage field in weighted_constituent_breadth_snapshots is active_weight_pct NOT weight_coverage_pct.
governance_rules.no_trade_date_in_option_chain: option_chain_snapshots has no trade_date column. Always use WHERE ts::date = CURRENT_DATE or ts AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Kolkata'.
governance_rules.shadow_v3_not_v2: shadow_signal_snapshots_v2 was NEVER created. All shadow signal queries must target shadow_signal_snapshots_v3.

session_resume_template.description: Paste this structure at the start of every new dev session, filled in for the specific goal.

format.DO_NOT_REOPEN: [items that are settled â€” prevents re-litigation]
format.RELEVANT_FILES: [list only files relevant to this session's goal]
format.RELEVANT_TABLES: [list only tables relevant to this session's goal]
